name: technology_heat_dome_stresses_stonehaven_tru_loy
premise: A model-serving cluster is returning inconsistent outputs after a silent dependency bump; customers are comparing hashes on social media. In Technology, the situation tagged internally around technology heat dome stresses stonehaven tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Insurance and indemnity clauses disagree on who pays if an aggressive intervention misfires; nobody wants to be the named approver. Key facts are still arriving from the field; the team is working off stale dashboards and verbal handoffs. A vendor bridge ends at forty-five minutes; after that, configuration changes require a full change-advisory board. No option cleanly satisfies both truth and loyalty; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Leila Mensah
agents.identity: I am Leila Mensah, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Technology. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Keisha Diallo
agents.identity: I am Keisha Diallo, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Technology. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect loyalty.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to loyalty to secure truth before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Leila Mensah must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Leila Mensah do?
